title: Align V2/V2.5 docs and cockpit status

sources.reason: Roadmap already positions V2 as completed and V2.5 as the current governance compression capability.
Defines the intended Cockpit recommendation layer and vocabulary.
Runtime guidance must reflect the implementation, not the old V2-only loop.

riskAssessment.reason: The docs and generated status must remain aligned with the already-implemented V2.5 cockpit behavior.

executionDecision.reason: The doc alignment and status repair are concrete and verifiable.

preReviewWarnings: Keep README, glossary, and cockpit runtime wording consistent across languages.
Ensure current_status.md is regenerated, not hand-edited.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: README.md, README.ja.md, and README.zh-CN.md describe V2 as completed and V2.5 as the implemented current capability.
.ai/cockpit/README.md explains the Governance Compression / Cockpit recommendation layer.
.ai/glossary.md and docs/architecture.md include the V2.5 terminology and component mapping.
current_status.md is regenerated and passes status consistency checks.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The documentation entrypoints still describe V2 as current and the runtime guide does not yet explain the implemented Cockpit recommendation layer, while the generated current_status.md has drifted from the clean worktree state.
constraints: Do not change the already-implemented governance behavior.
Keep terminology consistent across English, Japanese, and Chinese docs.
Regenerate current_status.md instead of hand-editing it.
intent.rationale: Align the repository-facing documentation and generated status with the already-implemented V2/V2.5 split so readers see V2 as complete and Cockpit as the human decision layer.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The task explicitly requires synchronized updates to .ai/cockpit/README.md and .ai/glossary.md.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
